# robots.txt — AirDate.tv (dev / staging)
# https://dev.airdate.tv
# Generated: June 2026 | Stratustier Innovation Labs

# ── Staging environment: block all crawlers ────────────────────────────────
# dev.airdate.tv is a staging environment and should NOT be indexed.
# All crawlers are disallowed to prevent duplicate content penalties
# and to protect pre-launch features from being indexed before June 11 launch.

User-agent: *
Disallow: /

# ── Production robots.txt (airdate.tv) lives separately ───────────────────
# The production site at https://airdate.tv uses a separate robots.txt
# that allows crawling of all public routes listed in sitemap.xml.

# Sitemap reference (production)
# Sitemap: https://airdate.tv/sitemap.xml
